---
description: "Run pytest and fix any issues to make tests pass"
name: "Pytest Help"
argument-hint: "Execute pytest and troubleshoot failures"
agent: "agent"
---

Run pytest in the workspace. If tests fail, analyze the errors and fix them by:
- Installing missing dependencies
- Configuring test database or fixtures
- Fixing import paths or code issues
- Updating test code

Use tools to run commands, check files, and make edits. Iterate until all tests pass.
